description: Style NoteThe Benecio shoe in white from puma is designed for the all-important purpose of you looking great while having fun. This pair is for those who want to make a bold statement without sacrificing on comfort and style. So throw on your favourite jeans, lace 'em up and hit the streets in real retro style. Product DetailsLeather upper with stitch detailing and blue formstripe panelLace-up system for a snug and customised FitPadded collar and fabric inner for comfortBrand name on the tongue and brand logo on the collar for stylePU midsole with PU foxing for enhanced durability and styleBrand name badge on the heelVulcanized rubber outsole with textured brand name grooves for flexibility and traction Material and CareSynthetic, leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
